content: I think deferring to the forehead tier list for meta purposes is reasonable. If you are some kind of barbarian that doesn't rate characters on that axis, I think zyocuh https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/10UVim8m1SnY9fSDKfaH4AwnPPd22zsCDDNB6SV15yO4/edit?gid=1416721968#gid=1416721968 or monchi https://www.reddit.com/r/Morimens/comments/1q230d0/400_dtide_4_tier_list/ have pretty reasonable takes.

embeds.title: An Exceedingly Brief Arc 1 Morimens Tier List
embeds.description:
A very short video retrospective and ranking on my experiences with all of the characters in Morimens Arc 1 "Forgotten Chapters" after over a year and several hundred hours of playing the game. Tier List is ONLY based on Arc 1 performance!!!
00:00 Introduction
01:13 Tier List Parameters & Ranking Sy

For chapter 4 boss fight, I beat it but had trouble sustaining, do you just stall with caro heal in the meantime while you're building Mouchette's exalt back up, is it supposed to be slow? I'm using speedrun setup without Thais, using Aigis + Ogier

Sorry arc 1 ch 4, yea cerberus dog boss
oh the hound of [censored]
I can't get her exalt back up quickly after using it for turn 1, maybe I was doing it wrong but I can't do enough dmg for each hp milestone without it
Ok so dmg isn’t lacking but aliemus
Interesting albeit strange
Are you not feeding the embryos to her?
what team were you using?
mouchette, aegis, ogier and who
Helot, I think I was saving for her exalt, in the beginning I wasn't making enough for embryo
are you using helot+mouchette exalts at the same time?
Yea
Yeah without Thais embryo generation is def worse
But as long as you’re feeding them back into Mouch it shouldn’t take too long
the damage you do on exalt turns is huge, the damage otherwise isnt important, just focus on shields when the exalts arent up
Yea it wasn't that bad, just asking now since ch 4 is the first chapter where I had to focus more on actions
Ok got it, ty both
Theres 2 ways, either you brute force through 1 shield or just proc shield and focus on getting exalt up again
Aigis devour stuns the boss for 1 turn to stall too

Hmmk, yea Aigis is really helpful
Currently I don't do enough dmg to get through the shield for it to be meaningful, but honestly I think I could've been more careful of holding onto Helot ult
Still good points to keep in mind yea
Ya the point is to proc the shield and then move on
Its easier to proc shield and save for next burst

is farming event actually stamina efficient?
(after all first time rewards have been claimed already)
Event is a good source of Rose Scrip and mats. If you want to farm both at once and doesn't have specific realm to upgrade in mind, it's worth.
Else  just use stamina for the cov
Is there a maintenance or something? I can't login for hours already
no
When it comes to Covenant stats whats the goal to look for on the pieces that can't roll crit stats?
keyflare most important
after that death resistance is solid if you dont have anything specific you're looking for
some teams prefer dmg amp or realm mastery
but all appreciate death resist
Guessing sigil is the absolute bottom of the barrel pick?
there may be a reason u want it but i havent found it yet
some characters do scale with sigil yield stats
but i havent seen any where its actually worth building
Actually that leads me into another question, how does the tentacles interact with the crit chance/damage stats?
tentacles have team total crit × 0.5
and temporary crit buffs x 0.25
it counts per awakener
so if an effect raises the whole team crit rate then i believe it has full effect on tentacles
So if i use Corposant's Exalt would that make the tentacles do 5% critt dmg on the tentacles then? Or is that full 20 and stuff like blade of the titan is only 0.25 of full effect.
the latter
Cool, so exalting with her would give me 35% critt dmg on the tentacles then if i understand correctly, cool seems like a pretty easy choice on what to run then
Skey > DMG amp
The more i learn about this game the more i realize that Skey is just the greatest
can never have enough keyflare
Speaking of, is there any in obvious good first posse i should chase?
festival of tides is a solid generalist posse if you cant decide
theres no team that doesnt want 2 cards and 2 arith
most teams BiS posse are something unique to that team though
like mouchette wants her own posse, kath wants her own posse, pollux wants his own posse
corposant wants encounter in pure white
Yeah kinda figured, it's what im running right now since it makes to much sense
Will probably save for the festival then, if i understand it correctly you have to save 7 of those daily orb thingies right?
